articles.title: Micron and other chip stocks feel the pain of imported volatility — blame SK Hynix

articles.title: 'Funflation' hits home: Why staying in isn't the cost-saver it used to be

articles.title: ‘It’s heartbreaking’: My brother claimed Social Security at 70. He died from cancer after one payment. Why wait to claim?
articles.description: “I’ve always been a little skeptical of the government’s encouragement to delay claiming benefits.”

articles.title: My wife’s 2011 Ford Fiesta was totaled. Should we accept a $2,000 insurance settlement or give up the car for $2,700?
articles.description: “The hood is bent, the radiator is cracked, and the front bumper is destroyed.”

articles.title: Geopolitical shock exposes SK Hynix leverage after hot ADR debut
